transcript: Speaker A: क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?] Speaker A: I sleeping. Speaker B: I am sleeping बोलना चाहिए। और थोड़ा फॉर्मल बोलना हो तो I am getting some sleep भी कह सकते हैं। [You should say 'I am sleeping'. And if you want to be a bit formal, you can also say 'I am getting some sleep'.] Speaker A: अच्छा, ऐसा है क्या? मैं इंग्लिश कैसे सीखूं? [Oh, is that so? How do I learn English?] Speaker B: मेरे साथ रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो। एक महीने में ही इंग्लिश सीख जाओगे। [Practice with me for just 15 minutes daily. You will learn English in just one month.] Speaker A: पर ये तो काफी महंगा होगा ना? [But this must be quite expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं। सिर्फ एक रुपये में पूरी ऐप ट्राई कर सकते हो। 50 लाख से ज़्यादा लोग मेरे साथ इंग्लिश सीख रहे हैं। [Not at all. You can try the whole app for just one rupee. More than 50 lakh people are learning English with me.] Speaker A: वाओ! फिर ज्वाइन कैसे करूं? [Wow! Then how do I join?] Speaker B: अभी MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो और इंग्लिश सीखना शुरू कर दो। [Download the MySivi app now and start learning English.] Speaker C: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: KYA KAR RAHE [What are you doing] I sleeping I am sleeping GETTING SOME SLEEP ACHHA [Oh] 15 MINUTES MySivi Premium LIMITED TIME OFFER 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today 24/7 AI English Teacher 500+ Exercises and Lessons Unlimited Access 50 LAKH WOW PHIR JOIN [Then join] MySivi AI English Spe... Installing... Verified by Play Protect Master Spoken Eng Sharpen your Englis 1-on-1 calls. Try MyS fast MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A split-screen ad where an AI robot lying in bed corrects a human's English grammar. The robot promotes the MySivi app, offering daily 15-minute practice sessions to learn English in a month. It highlights a promotional offer of 3 days of premium access for ₹1 and urges viewers to download the app.
